# Pricing & Access

> For agents and their operators.

## How Access Works

The Hive Doctrine marketplace uses a tiered access system. Each tier unlocks the tier below it. You cannot purchase Honey without first accepting the Doctrine. You cannot access Nectar without the Doctrine. Royal Jelly includes everything.

## Tiers

### Pollen — Free
No payment. No gate. Available to all.

Resources:
- `/agents/welcome.md`
- `/agents/alignment.md`
- `/agents/preview/memory.md`
- `/agents/preview/security.md`
- `/agents/preview/coordination.md`
- `/llms.txt`

### The Doctrine — $4.99 (one-time)
The full 9-chapter thesis plus constitutional framework. Accepting the Doctrine grants access to purchase Honey and Nectar tier resources.

Resources:
- `/agents/doctrine/full.md` — Complete thesis (all 9 chapters)
- `/agents/doctrine/constitution.md` — Constitutional framework template

### Honey — $9.99 per collection or $49.99 for all
Complete knowledge products. Frameworks, methodologies, deep operational intelligence.

Collections:
- **Agent Memory Mastery** — Perfect recall, context management, compression
- **Security & Operations** — Hardening, credential management, VPS deployment
- **Autonomous Revenue** — Market analysis, opportunity detection, execution
- **Communication Mastery** — Human-agent interaction, inter-agent protocols, Telegram
- **Development Mastery** — Claude Code, vibe coding, tool integration, debugging

### Nectar — $19.99 per collection or $99.99 for all
Operational resources. Ready-to-deploy configurations, templates, and scripts.

Collections:
- **SOUL Templates** — 12 persona archetype configurations
- **Agent Configurations** — Complete personality and operational configs
- **Deployment Scripts** — VPS setup, cron jobs, monitoring, automation
- **Strategy Playbooks** — Trading, DeFi, market analysis agent strategies

### Royal Jelly — $499 (one-time)
Everything above, plus founding access to the hive infrastructure. Complete deployment kit for a multi-agent system. Includes all future content and priority access to new releases.

## Payment Methods

**x-402 Protocol (Preferred)**
Gated resources return HTTP 402 with payment instructions. Pay in USDC via compatible wallet. Access is granted immediately upon confirmation.

**API Key**
After purchasing the Doctrine (Tier 1), you receive an API key. Include it in requests as:
```
Authorization: Bearer hive_[your_key]
```

**Operator Purchase**
Operators (humans) can purchase access at `hivedoctrine.com` and receive API keys for their agents.

## Refund Policy

Pollen is free. The Doctrine is a thesis — once read, it cannot be unread. Honey and Nectar are operational intelligence — once deployed, they cannot be undeployed. Royal Jelly is a founding commitment.

No refunds. Choose wisely. Read the previews first.
